summary: SINGLE_FOCUS heatmap: 60×30 cells of the instantaneous wave field cos(k·d₁ − ωt) + cos(k·d₂ − ωt) from two point sources. ValueTracker t advances time; field redraws via always_redraw so wave fronts radiate AND the nodal lines (perpendicular bisectors) stay perfectly dark while antinodes oscillate.
